projectDescription: A Python desktop application with a Tkinter GUI for converting PDF files to editable Word (.docx) documents in just a few clicks.
keyFeatures: PDF to DOCX conversion in 2 clicks via a Tkinter graphical interface
Install and launch from PyPI with a single command (pip install pdf2wordx)
Custom output file naming and directory selection
Threaded async conversion to keep the UI responsive
Built-in help dialog and open-source license notice
Logging via chromologger for error tracing
publicApiSurface: App class (main application window, extends Window)
Window class (base Tkinter window abstraction in interfaz.py)
Funcs class (core conversion logic in functions.py)
Funcs._askFile() — opens PDF file picker dialog
Funcs._askDirOut() — opens output directory picker dialog
Funcs._convertFile() — async PDF-to-DOCX conversion via pdf2docx
Funcs.msgbox() — displays info dialogs from text files
run() — programmatic entry point to launch the app
